home.title: Vita Integral - Healthy Products Store
home.description: Discover our selection of natural, organic products tailored to your healthy lifestyle.

about.metaDescription: Learn about Vita Integral's story, a healthy market founded in 2012 in Medellín by Carlos and Patricia, pioneers of conscious eating in Colombia.
about.heroSubtitle: Over 40 years of passion for healthy eating
about.heroDescription: A love story for life, health and well-being that began long before Vita Integral existed.
about.beginningsTitle: Carlos & Patricia: Pioneers of Natural Food
about.beginningsText: Carlos and Patricia, founders of this beautiful company, have worked in the healthy food industry for over 40 years. They started with health food stores in Medellín during a time when very few people sought these dietary alternatives.
about.internationalText: After living abroad and experiencing different food cultures, the founders returned to Medellín with a clear vision: to create a space where people could find everything they need for a healthy life.
about.foundingText: Vita Integral, a pioneering healthy market in Colombia, opened its doors with the mission of offering a wide variety of healthy products at fair prices in one place.
about.challengesText: At first we faced difficulties due to the lack of local suppliers. We had to import products or bring them from Bogotá while developing relationships with local entrepreneurs who shared our vision.
about.todayText: Today we have multiple locations in Medellín and the metropolitan area, and we have helped position local suppliers nationally and internationally. Our store evolved to offer a wide variety of healthy products at fair prices in one place.
about.ctaDescription: Visit our stores and discover why thousands of families trust Vita Integral for their healthy eating.

missionVision.metaDescription: Learn about Vita Integral's mission, vision and values. Coherence, consciousness and serving with love are the pillars of our healthy market.
missionVision.heroDescription: Our commitment goes beyond selling products. We want to be part of your journey towards a healthier and more conscious life.
missionVision.missionText: To offer our customers a wide variety of natural foods that align with the true needs of your body, at fair prices.
missionVision.visionText: That your pantry and fridge always have healthy Vita Integral products, being a fundamental part of your conscious lifestyle.
missionVision.valuesDescription: The principles that guide every decision and action at Vita Integral.
missionVision.coherenceText: We maintain consistency between our philosophy and daily actions. What we say is what we do.
missionVision.consciousnessText: We promote the integral harmony of the human being (body, mind, spirit) and respect for the environment.
missionVision.loveText: We cultivate welcoming spaces where we accompany our customers' evolution through healthy nutritional options.
missionVision.valueCreationDescription: Our selection process ensures that every product on our shelves meets the highest quality standards.
missionVision.evaluationText: We carefully evaluate our suppliers, considering ingredients, nutritional information and production processes.
missionVision.agroText: We prioritize products from suppliers who follow agroecological and sustainable practices.
missionVision.functionalText: We select products that provide real health and wellness benefits.
missionVision.environmentText: We favor environmentally responsible packaging and presentations.
missionVision.ctaDescription: Join the community of people who choose to eat consciously and responsibly.

locations.metaDescription: Find the Vita Integral location nearest to you. Stores in Laureles, Poblado and Envigado. Hours, phones and addresses.
locations.heroDescription: Visit us at any of our stores in Medellín and the metropolitan area. Warm and welcoming spaces with personalized advice to guide your dietary decisions.
locations.onlineDescription: Our online store is available 24/7 with delivery in Medellín, metropolitan area and nationwide shipping.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using the Vita Integral online store. Purchase, shipping, returns and warranty policies.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By using our online store and/or making purchases at Vita Integral SAS (NIT: 900779886), you accept the following terms and conditions. We recommend reading them carefully.
terms.s1Text: Vita Integral SAS is a Colombian company dedicated to the commercialization of healthy, natural and organic products. Our main office is located at Av. Nutibara Trv. 39B 77-40, Medellín, Antioquia.
terms.s2_1Text: If you receive a damaged or expired product, you have 48 hours from the time of receiving the order to report it.
terms.s2_1Item3: The product must be in its complete original packaging
terms.s2_1Item4: The exchange will be for the same item or a credit will be offered
terms.s2_2Text: If you received a product different from what was ordered, you have 48 hours to report it. We will exchange it for the correct product or refund the incorrect item.
terms.s2_3Text: In accordance with Colombian consumer protection regulations, you have the right to withdraw from your purchase within 5 business days after receiving the product, provided that:
terms.s2_3Item1: The product has not been opened or consumed
terms.s2_3Item2: The product is not for personal use
terms.s2_3Item3: Labels, accessories and original packaging are intact
terms.s2_3Item4: There are no signs of use or deterioration
terms.s2_3Note: Note: Return shipping costs are the customer's responsibility. Returns of perishable products are not accepted.
terms.s3_1Text: We make our own deliveries in Medellín and the metropolitan area (from Caldas to Girardota) and in some municipalities of Eastern Antioquia (El Retiro, Rionegro, La Ceja).
terms.s3_1Item2: Dispatch hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM
terms.s3_1Item3: Morning orders can be delivered the same day
terms.s3_2Text: National shipments are made through a third-party carrier.
terms.s3_2Item2: Cost depends on weight, size and destination
terms.s3_2Item3: We are not responsible for perishable products requiring cold chain if they arrive damaged, as shipping is through a third party
terms.s3_3Text: You can pick up your order at no additional cost at any of our locations.
terms.s4Text: Vita Integral is not responsible for who receives your order. Any person present at the registered address at the time of delivery is considered authorized.
terms.s5Text: We accept the following payment methods:
terms.s5Note: Note: We do not accept Diners Club.
terms.s6Text: All content on the website, including text, images, logos, photographs, multimedia and advertising material, belongs exclusively to Vita Integral SAS. Its reproduction or distribution requires written authorization.
terms.s7Text: Vita Integral SAS reserves the right to modify these terms and conditions at any time. Modifications will be effective from their publication on the website.
terms.s8Text: For any inquiry or complaint related to these terms, you can contact us through:
terms.s8Item3: Address: Av. Nutibara Trv. 39B 77-40, Medellín, Antioquia

habeasData.metaDescription: Vita Integral SAS Data Protection Policy in accordance with Law 1581 of 2012. Know your rights regarding the processing of your personal data.
habeasData.title: Data Protection Policy
habeasData.subtitle: In accordance with Law 1581 of 2012 and Decree 1377 of 2013
habeasData.intro: The right of Habeas Data is a fundamental right that allows you to know, update and rectify information collected about you in databases. Vita Integral SAS guarantees the full exercise of this right.
habeasData.s1Address: Address: Av. Nutibara Trv. 39B 77-40, Medellín, Antioquia, Colombia
habeasData.s2Intro: Vita Integral SAS collects and processes personal data for the following purposes:
habeasData.s2OrdersText: Name, address, phone, email and identification number to process and deliver your order.
habeasData.s2PaymentsText: Banking data only to process refunds when applicable.
habeasData.s2MarketingText: Promotions, events, loyalty programs and contests (with your consent).
habeasData.s2AnalyticsText: Understanding customer preferences and improving our services.
habeasData.s3Intro: As a personal data subject, you have the following rights:
habeasData.s3AccessText: Know what personal data we have about you and how we are using it.
habeasData.s3UpdateText: Request correction of incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data.
habeasData.s3DeleteText: Request deletion of your data when there is no legal or contractual duty to retain them.
habeasData.s3RevokeText: Revoke the authorization granted for the processing of your personal data.
habeasData.s3ComplaintText: File complaints with the Superintendence of Industry and Commerce for violations of the law.
habeasData.s4Intro: To exercise any of your rights, send a written request to:
habeasData.s4Req4: Clear description of the request and the data you wish to act upon
habeasData.s4ResponseTime: We will respond to your request within a maximum of 10 business days from the date of receipt.
habeasData.s5Intro: As the data controller, we commit to:
habeasData.s5Item1: Request and maintain express authorization before collecting personal data
habeasData.s5Item2: Clearly inform the purpose of data processing
habeasData.s5Item7: Allow access to data when requested
habeasData.s6Text: This policy takes effect from its publication and will remain in effect as long as Vita Integral SAS continues its operations. We reserve the right to modify this policy, notifying you of any significant changes.
habeasData.s7Text: The Superintendence of Industry and Commerce (SIC) is the competent authority to oversee compliance with personal data protection legislation in Colombia.

dataPolicy.metaDescription: Learn how Vita Integral collects, uses and protects your personal data in accordance with Law 1581 of 2012.
dataPolicy.title: Personal Data Treatment Policy
dataPolicy.intro: This policy describes how Vita Integral SAS (NIT: 900779886) collects, uses, stores and protects your personal data, in compliance with Law 1581 of 2012 and its regulatory decrees.
dataPolicy.s2Intro: We collect the following types of personal data:
dataPolicy.s2Item1: Identification data: Full name, identification number (ID or NIT)
dataPolicy.s2Item3: Payment data: Card or bank account information (for refunds)
dataPolicy.s2Item4: Browsing data: Cookies, purchase history, preferences
dataPolicy.s3Intro: We use your personal data to:
dataPolicy.s3Item3: Create and maintain your customer account
dataPolicy.s3Item4: Send you information about promotions, events and news (with your consent)
dataPolicy.s3Item5: Improve our services and shopping experience
dataPolicy.s3Item7: Comply with legal and contractual obligations
dataPolicy.s4Text: Our website uses cookies to recognize visitors and maintain information between browsing sessions. This allows us to personalize your experience and prevent information loss during navigation.
dataPolicy.s5Text: Our site may contain links to third-party pages. Once you click on these links and leave our page, we no longer have control over the site you are redirected to. We are not responsible for the terms, privacy or data protection of external sites. We recommend reviewing the privacy policies of any site you visit.
dataPolicy.s6Text: We may share your personal data with third parties and allied organizations only when necessary to fulfill the described purposes, except when prohibited by law or when you have revoked your consent.
dataPolicy.s7Text: We implement technical, administrative and physical security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction. However, no method of Internet transmission is 100% secure.
dataPolicy.s8Intro: As a data subject, you have the right to:
dataPolicy.s8Item1: Know, update and rectify your personal data
dataPolicy.s8Item2: Request deletion of your data when there is no legal obligation to retain them
dataPolicy.s8Item4: Access your personal data free of charge
dataPolicy.s8Item5: File complaints with the Superintendence of Industry and Commerce
dataPolicy.s9Intro: To exercise your rights, you can contact us through:
dataPolicy.s9Note: Your request must include: full name, contact information, identification document and a clear description of the request.
dataPolicy.s10Text: Vita Integral SAS reserves the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Changes will be published on our website and, when significant, we will notify you by email.
dataPolicy.s11Text: This policy is governed by Law 1581 of 2012 (Personal Data Protection Law) and its regulatory decrees, especially Decree 1377 of 2013.

customerService.metaDescription: Vita Integral help center. Return policies, exchanges, right of withdrawal and all the information you need for an excellent shopping experience.
customerService.heroDescription: We're here to provide you with the best experience. Find answers to your questions or contact us directly.
customerService.damagedText: You have 48 hours from receipt to report products in poor condition.
customerService.damagedItem3: Exchange for same product or store credit
customerService.wrongText: If you received a product different from what was ordered, you have 48 hours to report it.
customerService.retractText: Under Colombian law, you have 5 business days to withdraw from your purchase.
customerService.faq1Q: What is the delivery time in Medellín?
customerService.faq1A: Orders placed before 12:00 PM can be delivered the same day. Afternoon orders are dispatched the next business day. Delivery cost in Medellín and metropolitan area is approximately $6,000 COP.
customerService.faq2A: Yes, we ship nationwide through a carrier. National dispatches are made Monday through Thursday only. Cost depends on weight, size and destination.
customerService.faq3Q: Can I pick up my order at the store?
customerService.faq3A: Yes, you can choose the store pickup option when placing your order. There is no additional cost and you can pick it up at any of our locations.
customerService.faq4Q: What payment methods do you accept?
customerService.faq4A: We accept cash, Bancolombia transfer, and debit/credit cards (Visa, Mastercard). We also accept Sodexo and Bigpass. We do not accept Diners Club.
customerService.faq5Q: What do I do if I receive a damaged product?
customerService.faq5A: You have 48 hours from order receipt to report damaged or expired products. Contact us with your invoice and product photos. We will make the exchange or give you store credit.
customerService.faq6A: Yes, we handle products that require cold chain. For national shipments, keep in mind that shipping is through a third party and we are not responsible if perishable products arrive in poor condition.
customerService.notFoundTitle: Didn't find what you were looking for?
customerService.notFoundDescription: Our customer service team is ready to help you with any questions or concerns.

scheduleOrders.metaDescription: Learn about our service modes, store and dispatch hours, and how to place orders at Vita Integral.
scheduleOrders.heroDescription: Multiple ways to shop for your convenience: visit us in store, buy online or call us by phone.
scheduleOrders.physicalStoresDesc: Visit our 3 locations in Medellín. Warm and welcoming spaces with personalized advice.
scheduleOrders.onlineStoreDesc: Shop 24/7 from anywhere. Home delivery or free store pickup.
scheduleOrders.byPhoneDesc: Call us Monday to Saturday 9am to 4pm for same-day delivery orders.
scheduleOrders.medellinAreaDesc: Own delivery from Caldas to Girardota
scheduleOrders.medellinTime: Same day or next business day
scheduleOrders.importantItem1: Morning orders can be dispatched the same afternoon.
scheduleOrders.importantItem2: Afternoon orders are shipped the next business day based on availability.
scheduleOrders.importantItem3: National shipments are dispatched only Monday through Thursday.
scheduleOrders.importantItem4: Some artisan products have limited availability.
scheduleOrders.paymentDescription: We accept multiple payment methods for your convenience
scheduleOrders.paymentNote: Note: We do not accept Diners Club

vegano.name: Vegan
vegano.shortDescription: 100% plant-based diet, free from any animal products.
vegano.fullDescription: The vegan diet excludes all animal products, including meat, fish, dairy, eggs, and honey. According to studies published in scientific journals such as SciELO, this diet is associated with lower risk of cardiovascular disease, obesity, type 2 diabetes, and hypertension. An analysis of over 20 years of research (2024) found that it significantly reduces the risk of cancer and heart disease.
vegano.benefits_0: Lower risk of cardiovascular disease according to multiple studies
vegano.benefits_1: Associated with reduced obesity and type 2 diabetes
vegano.benefits_2: Lower risk of certain types of cancer (colon, prostate, liver)
vegano.benefits_3: Rich in fiber, antioxidants, and beneficial plant compounds
vegano.benefits_4: Lower environmental impact and carbon footprint
vegano.considerations_0: Requires planning to avoid nutritional deficiencies
vegano.considerations_1: Possible deficiency of vitamin B12, iron, zinc, calcium, and vitamin D
vegano.considerations_2: According to Mayo Clinic, B12 and other nutrient supplements may be necessary
vegano.considerations_3: Higher risk of fractures if adequate calcium intake is not ensured
vegano.considerations_4: Consult with a nutrition professional to optimize the diet
vegano.tips_0: Supplement vitamin B12, as it is not available in plants
vegano.tips_1: Combine legumes with grains to obtain complete amino acids
vegano.tips_2: Include omega-3 sources such as chia seeds, flax, and walnuts
vegano.tips_3: Consume iron-rich foods (legumes, spinach) with vitamin C to improve absorption
vegano.allowedFoods_0: All types of fruits and vegetables

vegetariano.name: Vegetarian
vegetariano.shortDescription: Diet without meat or fish, but may include dairy and eggs.
vegetariano.fullDescription: The vegetarian diet excludes meat, fish, and seafood, but allows animal-derived products such as dairy, eggs, and honey. According to CNN's analysis (2024) of over 20 years of research, following a lacto-ovo vegetarian diet significantly reduces the risk of developing cancer, heart disease, and premature death. It is a more flexible option that makes it easier to obtain essential nutrients.
vegetariano.benefits_0: Reduces cardiovascular risk factors according to scientific studies
vegetariano.benefits_1: Lower risk of hypertension and elevated cholesterol levels
vegetariano.benefits_2: Protective effect against several types of cancer
vegetariano.benefits_3: Easier to follow than a strict vegan diet
vegetariano.benefits_4: Lower risk of nutritional deficiencies than veganism
vegetariano.considerations_1: Plant-based iron is less absorbed than animal-based iron
vegetariano.considerations_2: Possible need to supplement B12 in ovo-vegetarian diets
vegetariano.considerations_3: Watch saturated fat intake if consuming lots of dairy
vegetariano.tips_0: Vary your protein sources among dairy, eggs, and legumes
vegetariano.tips_1: Include whole grains in every meal for fiber and nutrients
vegetariano.tips_2: Consume plant-based iron (spinach, legumes) with vitamin C
vegetariano.tips_3: Eggs are an excellent source of B12, choline, and complete protein
vegetariano.allowedFoods_0: All types of fruits and vegetables

sin-lactosa.name: Lactose-Free
sin-lactosa.shortDescription: Free from lactose, ideal for people with intolerance to this sugar.
sin-lactosa.fullDescription: A lactose-free diet is necessary for people with lactose intolerance, a condition where the body does not produce enough lactase, the enzyme that digests milk sugar. According to MedlinePlus, this condition affects approximately 65% of the world's adult population, being more common in people of Asian, African, and Latin American descent. Avoiding lactose eliminates symptoms such as bloating, gas, diarrhea, and abdominal pain.
sin-lactosa.benefits_0: Eliminates digestive symptoms like bloating, gas, and diarrhea
sin-lactosa.benefits_1: Improves quality of life in intolerant individuals
sin-lactosa.benefits_2: Allows better absorption of other nutrients
sin-lactosa.benefits_3: Wide variety of alternatives currently available
sin-lactosa.benefits_4: Does not require eliminating all dairy, only those containing lactose
sin-lactosa.considerations_0: It is different from milk protein allergy
sin-lactosa.considerations_1: Some may tolerate small amounts of lactose
sin-lactosa.considerations_2: Very aged cheeses tend to have less lactose
sin-lactosa.considerations_3: Important to ensure adequate calcium and vitamin D intake
sin-lactosa.tips_0: Read labels: lactose, whey, curds, and milk solids contain lactose
sin-lactosa.tips_1: Aged cheeses (Parmesan, aged cheddar) have very little lactose
sin-lactosa.tips_2: Fortified plant milks provide equivalent calcium
sin-lactosa.tips_3: Yogurts with active probiotics may be better tolerated
sin-lactosa.avoidFoods_0: Regular cow, goat, and sheep milk
sin-lactosa.avoidFoods_4: Some processed products with hidden lactose

organico.name: Organic
organico.shortDescription: Products grown without synthetic pesticides or artificial chemicals.
organico.fullDescription: Organic eating is based on consuming products grown without synthetic pesticides, chemical fertilizers, genetically modified organisms (GMOs), or artificial additives. According to studies, organic products may contain higher levels of certain antioxidants. Organic agriculture also benefits the environment by protecting biodiversity and soil and water quality.
organico.benefits_0: Lower exposure to synthetic pesticide residues
organico.benefits_1: Some studies show higher antioxidant content
organico.considerations_0: Generally more expensive than conventional products
organico.considerations_1: The 'organic' label doesn't necessarily mean 'more nutritious'
organico.considerations_2: Look for recognized official certification seals
organico.considerations_3: Organic products should also be washed before eating
organico.tips_0: Prioritize organic for products with the most pesticide residues
organico.tips_1: Look for local farmer markets for better prices
organico.tips_2: Verify they have official organic certification
organico.tips_3: Always wash fruits and vegetables, even organic ones
organico.allowedFoods_1: Meat from animals raised without hormones or antibiotics

sin-azucar.name: Sugar-Free
sin-azucar.shortDescription: Products without added sugars for better glycemic control.
sin-azucar.fullDescription: A no-added-sugar diet eliminates refined and processed sugars, allowing only naturally occurring sugars in foods like fruits. According to the WHO, excessive consumption of added sugars is associated with higher risk of obesity, type 2 diabetes, cardiovascular disease, and dental cavities. The WHO recommends that free sugars represent less than 10% of daily caloric intake.
sin-azucar.benefits_0: Better control of blood glucose levels
sin-azucar.benefits_1: Reduced risk of type 2 diabetes according to studies
sin-azucar.benefits_2: Improved dental health and lower risk of cavities
sin-azucar.benefits_3: May help with body weight management
sin-azucar.benefits_4: More stable energy levels throughout the day
sin-azucar.considerations_0: Natural fruit sugars are part of a healthy diet
sin-azucar.considerations_1: Read labels: sugar has many names (syrup, dextrose, maltose)
sin-azucar.considerations_2: Artificial sweeteners are an alternative but their use is debated
sin-azucar.considerations_3: Gradually reducing sugar makes palate adaptation easier
sin-azucar.tips_0: Learn the different names for sugar on labels
sin-azucar.tips_1: Use spices like cinnamon and vanilla for natural sweetness
sin-azucar.tips_2: Choose whole fruits instead of fruit juices
sin-azucar.tips_3: Stevia is a natural zero-calorie sweetener
sin-azucar.allowedFoods_5: Products sweetened with stevia or erythritol
sin-azucar.avoidFoods_5: Sauces and dressings with hidden sugar

paleo.name: Paleo
paleo.shortDescription: Based on foods our hunter-gatherer ancestors consumed.
paleo.fullDescription: The paleo, or paleolithic, diet is based on consuming foods that would have been available to our ancestors before agriculture: lean meats, fish, fruits, vegetables, nuts, and seeds. It eliminates grains, dairy, legumes, and processed foods. Some studies suggest benefits for weight loss and metabolic markers in the short term, although long-term evidence is limited.
paleo.benefits_2: Some studies show improvements in blood sugar in the short term
paleo.benefits_3: Rich in vitamins and minerals from natural sources
paleo.benefits_4: May help with initial weight loss
paleo.considerations_0: Eliminates nutritious food groups like legumes and whole grains
paleo.considerations_1: Can be difficult to maintain long-term
paleo.considerations_2: Limited scientific evidence for long-term benefits
paleo.considerations_3: Risk of calcium deficiency from eliminating dairy
paleo.considerations_4: Consult with a nutrition professional before starting
paleo.tips_1: Include a variety of colors in fruits and vegetables
paleo.tips_2: Nuts and seeds are excellent sources of healthy fat
paleo.tips_3: Don't fear natural fats from avocado, olive oil, and coconut

sin-gluten.name: Gluten-Free
sin-gluten.shortDescription: Free from gluten, essential for celiacs and gluten-sensitive individuals.
sin-gluten.fullDescription: According to the NIDDK (National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases), the gluten-free diet is the only effective treatment for celiac disease. Gluten is a protein found in wheat, barley, rye, and their derivatives. In celiacs, its consumption damages the small intestine. Following a strict gluten-free diet allows intestinal healing and symptom remission in most cases.
sin-gluten.benefits_0: Only effective treatment for celiac disease
sin-gluten.benefits_3: Relieves digestive symptoms in people with gluten sensitivity
sin-gluten.benefits_4: Symptoms improve days or weeks after starting the diet
sin-gluten.considerations_0: Do not start the diet without prior medical diagnosis (it hinders diagnosis)
sin-gluten.considerations_1: For people without celiac disease, there is no evidence of benefits
sin-gluten.considerations_2: Be careful with cross-contamination in the kitchen
sin-gluten.considerations_3: Many processed products contain hidden gluten
sin-gluten.tips_0: Always check labels: gluten hides in sauces and seasonings
sin-gluten.tips_1: Use separate utensils to avoid cross-contamination
sin-gluten.tips_2: Explore alternative flours: almond, coconut, rice, corn
sin-gluten.tips_3: Quinoa, rice, corn, and amaranth are naturally gluten-free
sin-gluten.avoidFoods_5: Sauces and soups thickened with flour

keto.name: Keto
keto.shortDescription: Very low in carbohydrates and high in healthy fats.
keto.fullDescription: The ketogenic or keto diet is very low in carbohydrates (less than 50g/day), high in fats (70-80%), and moderate in protein. According to the Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics, it was developed in 1921 to treat epilepsy. Meta-analyses have demonstrated its effectiveness for short-term weight loss and improved insulin sensitivity. The body enters ketosis, using ketones as fuel instead of glucose.
keto.benefits_0: Effective for short-term weight loss according to studies
keto.benefits_2: May improve insulin sensitivity in type 2 diabetics
keto.benefits_4: Some report greater mental clarity and stable energy
keto.considerations_0: May cause initial side effects ('keto flu')
keto.considerations_3: Risk of vitamin and mineral deficiencies
keto.considerations_4: Requires supervision by a health professional
keto.tips_0: Keep carbohydrates below 20-50g daily for ketosis
keto.tips_1: Include healthy fats: avocado, olive oil, nuts
keto.tips_2: Stay well hydrated and consider adding electrolytes
keto.tips_3: Plan your meals and have keto options available
